hk_end_souls_0.title: Hell Without Souls
hk_end_souls_0.body: Not a single soul descends anymore. Wars die down, mortals turn away from vice, and your corridors slowly empty. You rule over a deserted kingdom that no longer needs you.

hk_end_souls_100.title: Ocean of the Damned
hk_end_souls_100.body: The dead pour in without end. The screams never stop, the pits overflow, and the infernal judges collapse under the sheer number.

hk_end_legions_0.title: Alone on the Throne
hk_end_legions_0.body: Your armies have vanished. Desertions, mutinies, purges, whatever the cause. No one remains to carry out your orders. You still sit upon the throne... but behind you, the barracks stand empty.

hk_end_legions_100.title: Uncontrollable Armies
hk_end_legions_100.body: Your legions spread across the infernal plains like a black tide. Too many, too powerful, too hungry for war. You built an immense force... and it has already begun to stop fearing your name.

hk_end_order_0.title: Absolute Chaos
hk_end_order_0.body: Everything burns in every direction. Demons slaughter one another, the prisons open, the pacts are trampled. Hell is alive, yes... but in the form of a beast devouring itself.

hk_end_order_100.title: Smothering Order
hk_end_order_100.body: Every scream is cataloged, every torment planned, every demon watched. Nothing spills over. Nothing trembles. You turned Hell into a perfect machine... so perfect that it no longer needs you.

hk_end_surface_0.title: Forgotten by Mortals
hk_end_surface_0.body: Your influence over the surface has faded away. Cults fall, pacts vanish, humans even stop being afraid. You remain king of the depths... but above, no one thinks of you anymore.

hk_end_surface_100.title: Total Domination
hk_end_surface_100.body: Your shadow covers the world of the living. Kings make pacts, crowds panic, cities twist beneath the signs of your reign. Hell is forgotten, and your throne is lost.
